name: Paul Revere Program
mission: Persistent maritime awareness infrastructure designed to support maritime domain awareness, autonomous systems operations, modular mission capabilities, and government reach-back command.
problem: Continuous, low-intensity sensing and monitoring places a sustained burden on high-value crewed assets that are needed for higher-priority tasking.
approach: Provide persistent infrastructure that hosts sensing, autonomous systems support, and modular mission capability, reducing the routine monitoring burden on crewed platforms while government personnel retain command, mission, and authority.
